ksa_text: Skill in establishing, maintaining, and utilizing data dictionaries and metadata repositories to document data characteristics, definitions, lineage, and governance context.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-006 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.442 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.442) and is in_scope for the Master Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Master Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.442), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Master Data Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.442 is market-validated for Master Data Manager. Final decision: include.
